positive: A vibrant and whimsical central design featuring a stylized forest scene at twilight. Include silhouetted elements like tall, slender trees, glowing mushrooms, and gentle forest fauna (e.g., a small deer or fox). The style should be detailed, neo-traditional illustration, emphasizing clean black lines and a limited, deep color palette (indigo, teal, emerald green, gold accents). The composition must be circular or badge-like, framed by intricate floral or vine elements. The lighting should use high contrast between deep shadows and luminescent glow (bioluminescent effect) for depth. Perfect for a centered apparel graphic, vector art quality, smooth shading, high contrast, symmetrical arrangement.
negative: low quality, amateur, blurry, noise, grain, artifact, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, grunge, logo, trademark, realistic photography, photo-realistic, --ar 16:9, --ar 1:1
